scripts.predev: npm run build --workspace=sentinel-vite-plugin && npm run build --workspace=sentinel
scripts.dev: npm run dev --workspace=sentinel & npm run dev --workspace=playground
scripts.clean: rm -rf node_modules packages/sentinel/node_modules packages/sentinel-vite-plugin/node_modules playground/node_modules packages/sentinel/dist packages/sentinel-vite-plugin/dist playground/dist package-lock.json
